query:
SELECT familia, COUNT(*) as qtd, 
  CAST(AVG(CAST(modelagem AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as avg_modelagem,
  CAST(AVG(CAST(piloto AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as avg_piloto,
  CAST(AVG(CAST(corte AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as avg_corte,
  CAST(AVG(CAST(beneficiamento AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as avg_beneficiamento,
  CAST(AVG(CAST(costura AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as avg_costura,
  CAST(AVG(CAST(lavanderia AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as avg_lavanderia,
  CAST(AVG(CAST(acabamento AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as avg_acabamento,
  CAST(AVG(CAST(passadoria AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as avg_passadoria,
  CAST(AVG(CAST(tecido AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as avg_tecido,
  CAST(AVG(CAST(aviamento AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as avg_aviamento
FROM fichas_custo GROUP BY familia ORDER BY familia
